common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
common.networkError: Couldn’t reach Nutri. Check your internet connection.

home.pitchBody: Nutri plans your food around your training goals — whole ingredients, calculated for you.
home.seeMenuSecondary: Or take a look at the menu
home.greetingSub: Here's your day at a glance.
home.noSchedule: No training scheduled today — showing base targets.
home.missingProfileBody: Tell us about your goals and training and Nutri will work out daily calories and macros for you.
home.orderedNote: Based on today's orders with Nutri — not on logged meals.
home.pointsCardHint: Shows your point balance and transactions
home.rewardsBellAriaSpinReady: Weekly reward — a spin is waiting
home.actionAnpassarSub: Let Nutri put your order together

menu.empty: The menu is empty right now.

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyText: Add a meal from the menu to get started.
cart.emptySubline: Build your order and pay when you're ready.

checkout.closedText: You can't complete the order until we open.
checkout.notePlaceholder: E.g. no red onion, sauce on the side
checkout.payAtPickupSub: Pay when you pick up at the food truck
checkout.payOnlineSub: Card, Apple Pay and Google Pay via Stripe
checkout.onlineDrinksOnly: Online payment is available when you order food. Drinks can be paid at the counter.
checkout.infoHeading: Pay at the counter when you pick up
checkout.infoText: Your order is reserved for 10 minutes. Cooking doesn't start until you've paid.
checkout.accountRequiredTitle: An account is required to reserve
checkout.accountRequiredBody: It takes under 30 seconds and your cart is saved in the meantime. With an account you can see your order status and save your goals.
checkout.unavailableText: Update your cart before you can reserve the order.
checkout.activeReservationTitle: You already have an active reservation
checkout.activeReservationBody: Show it at the counter. If you'd like to add anything, let us know at the counter before you pay.
checkout.termsPrefix: By reserving an order you agree to our
checkout.errorStripeStartFailed: Couldn't start the online payment. Try again.
checkout.errorJustClosed: We just closed or paused. Try again later.
checkout.errorOutOfStockNamed: Sorry, {{name}} just sold out. Remove it from your cart or pick another meal.
checkout.errorOutOfStockGeneric: Sorry, an item in your cart just sold out. Remove it or choose something else.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in and continue your Nutri plan
auth.security: Encrypted login · We never share your details
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your Nutri profile and get a personal plan
auth.nameHelper: We use your name to make your profile personal.
auth.firstNameRequired: Enter your first name to continue
auth.marketingLabel: Get launch offers and updates from Nutri.
auth.marketingHint: You can unsubscribe at any time.
auth.duplicatePrefix: There's already an account with this email address.
auth.errorRateLimit: Too many sign-up attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
auth.termsPrefix: By creating an account you agree to Nutri's terms and
auth.inboxPrefix: We've sent a verification email to
auth.inboxSuffix: . Click the link in the email to activate your account.
auth.noSession: We can't find a verified session yet. Check the link in the email and try again.

orderStatus.showNumber: Show this number at the counter
orderStatus.countdownLeft: left to pay at the counter
orderStatus.stripePendingBody: Complete the payment so the kitchen gets your order.
orderStatus.expiredBody: The reservation ran out before payment was completed.
orderStatus.cancelledBody: This order is no longer active.
orderStatus.fetchErrorLong: Can't update status – showing the last known status.
orderStatus.pickupTitle: Show your order number at pickup
orderStatus.pickupBody: Present this number when your order is ready.

nutriAnpassar.slotHeroTitle: We do the math for you.
nutriAnpassar.slotHeroSubtitle: Pick a meal — Nutri adapts the portion to your goal.
nutriAnpassar.slotClosedTitle: The food truck is closed right now
nutriAnpassar.slotClosedBody: You can still browse meals and plan your order. Ordering and payment open when we're open.
nutriAnpassar.remainingGoalReachedTitle: You've reached your goal for today
nutriAnpassar.remainingGoalReachedSub: We can still suggest something light if you want to fine-tune the balance
nutriAnpassar.remainingLowEnergyTitle: You have a little energy left but still need protein
nutriAnpassar.remainingLowEnergySub: Nutri prioritises a lighter, high-protein meal
nutriAnpassar.remainingLeftToday: You have {{calories}} kcal and {{protein}}g protein left today
nutriAnpassar.mealsNearGoal: You're close to your goal — a light meal is recommended
nutriAnpassar.mealsWhy: Best match of your {{optionWord}} — hits your protein target without blowing the kcal.
nutriAnpassar.mealsEmptyTitle: No meals available for {{slot}} right now
nutriAnpassar.mealsEmptyBody: There are no dishes with ingredient data for this slot. Try another target.
nutriAnpassar.adjustWhy: Your adjustment stays within your {{slotWord}} — extra protein without blowing the kcal.
nutriAnpassar.adjustMinIngredientRequired: At least one ingredient is required
nutriAnpassar.errorProfileBody: Nutri anpassar needs your profile to calculate the right calorie and protein target per meal. Fill in your profile and you're good to go.
nutriAnpassar.errorNetworkBody: Couldn't fetch your data right now. Check your connection and try again.

onboardingGate.title: Create your Nutri profile
onboardingGate.body: To continue you need to create your Nutri profile first. Want to start now?

profile.identityFallback: Your nutrition plan adapts to everyday life, goals and balance.
profile.onboardingBody: Would you like to enter your diet profile now to unlock personalised meals and nutrition info?
profile.bannerIncompleteBody: Finish it to get personalised targets and carb cycling.
profile.incompletePlan: Fill in all required fields to unlock your nutrition plan.
profile.missingGoalPace: Pace is missing for your goal
profile.emptyPlan: Enter your goals and body measurements to calculate your personal diet plan.
profile.planDaySub: Get meals adapted to your goals
profile.bodyFatHelper: Makes your calculation more accurate. Not sure? Compare with the guide or skip.
profile.activityIntro: Choose how active your everyday life is. Steps and training help Nutri fine-tune your plan.
profile.trainingHelp: Count sessions that last at least about 30 minutes.
profile.primaryGoalHelp: Choose what Nutri should optimise your plan for.
profile.maintainNote: Maintenance keeps the plan close to your calculated energy needs.
profile.errorInvalidBasics: Check that age, weight and height are reasonable.
profile.trainingSheetBody: Nutri adjusts calories and carbs to your training days.
profile.trainingScheduleHelp: Tap a day and choose a type.
profile.trainingTimeHelp: Choose when you usually train. Nutri uses it to place your energy better.

mealDetail.closedNote: We're closed right now. You can add the item to your cart and order when we open.
mealDetail.allergyNote: Have an allergy? Talk to the staff.

coupon.welcomeBody: As a new member you get 20% off your first order. The coupon is valid for 30 days and is applied when you order.
coupon.welcomeClaimError: Couldn't fetch your coupon. You can claim it later under My coupons.
coupon.claimCardBody: 20% off your first order — valid for 30 days from when you claim it.
coupon.claimCardError: Couldn't claim the coupon. Try again.
coupon.loginRequired: Log in to see your coupons.
coupon.detailHowItWorks: The discount is applied to the whole order when you check out. The price is always recalculated at checkout — what you see in the cart is a preview.
coupon.rejectedSuffix: The coupon has been removed from your order. Try again.

landing.fulldaySubheading: For those who want to take it seriously.
fulldayBenefits: Your own meal boxes earn bonus points
landing.aboutBody: Nutri serves premium meals with clear calories, protein and portions — cooked for those who want to eat well without guessing.

heldag.heroBodyPrefix: Lunch + snack + dinner, adapted to your profile —
heldag.heroBodyStrong: ready to add to your cart.
heldag.heroNote: The calculation is based on your Nutri profile and today's goal. Earlier meals aren't automatically subtracted here.
heldag.availabilitySuffix: Lunch, snack and dinner in one package.
heldag.ctaOrder: Order the rest of the day
heldag.ctaNotReady: All three meals must be ready.
heldag.slotMissing: No meals available for this slot right now.
heldag.errorProfileBody: Today's package needs your profile to calculate the right calorie and protein target per meal.
heldag.errorNetwork: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
heldag.errorNoContainer: No suitable meal box was found.

rewards.spinSubtitle: One spin a week — the reward is added straight to your account.
rewards.comeBackTitle: Come back next week for a new spin.
rewards.wheelUnavailable: The reward wheel isn't available right now. Try again later.
rewards.spinError: Couldn't spin the wheel. Check your connection and try again.
rewards.modalNoWinBody: Better luck next week — the wheel will be waiting for you again in 7 days.
rewards.modalCouponBody: The coupon is under My coupons and is applied when you order.
rewards.modalPointsBody: The points have already been added to your account.
rewards.nudgeBody: One spin a week — you still have this week's.
rewards.mineEmpty: No rewards yet — spin the wheel to win your first.
rewards.loginRequired: Log in to see this week's reward.
rewards.fetchError: Couldn't load rewards. Check your connection.

points.historyEmpty: No point transactions yet — points are earned on orders and in the Weekly Reward.
points.loginRequired: Log in to see your Nutri points.

Active.label: Active
Active.description: Physical work or lots of movement

FatLoss.label: Fat loss
FatLoss.description: Reduce body fat with a controlled deficit

Maintain.label: Maintain
Maintain.description: Keep your weight and energy steady over time

MuscleGain.label: Muscle gain
MuscleGain.description: Build muscle with a controlled surplus

Aggressive.label: Aggressive
Aggressive.note: Faster results, but requires better consistency.

regularDrops.title: Vote for the next Nutri Drop
regularDrops.voteChangeNotice: You can change your vote while the poll is open.
regularDrops.thankYou: Thanks for helping us choose the next Nutri Drop.

errors.network: Couldn’t reach Nutri. Check your internet connection.
errors.pollNotFound: This vote is no longer available.
errors.optionNotFound: That option is no longer available.
errors.optionMismatch: Something went wrong with your choice. Please try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
